title: Hovership Havoc
description:
Hovership Havoc is a sci-fi twin stick shooter with 3rd person boss battles. Blast through rooms of a futuristic robotic factory filled with robot enemies. Equip your Hovership with randomly dropped abilities and upgrade your stats during and before each playthrough.Top Down ActionThird Person Boss Battles

• Randomly generated levels with 100s of combinations of rooms and enemy spawn patterns to ensure no two playthroughs are ever the same

• 4 playable Hoverships, each with their own unique main weapon and stats for completely different play styles

• Giant robotic boss battles that take place in a 3rd person perspective instead of top down

• 30+ Hovership sci-fi abilities such as nanobots, drones, missiles, lasers, shields, and more

• 15+ Robotic enemy types with their own attack styles and AI

• Collect ORBs to upgrade your hovership stats and abilities

• Permanent progression for each hovership between playthroughs

• Supports keyboard and mouse or controller input

• 3 Different futuristic sci-fi robotic factory environments
description_short: Hovership Havoc is a sci-fi twin stick shooter with 3rd person boss battles. Blast through rooms of a futuristic robotic factory filled with robot enemies. Equip your Hovership with randomly dropped abilities and upgrade your stats during each playthrough.
